summary: Q4 2024 APAC constant currency revenue was $15,206M with 9% YoY CC growth. Q3 2025 APAC CC was $17,691M with 19.28% YoY growth. Growth accelerated from 9% (Q4'24) to ~15% (Q1'25) to 19.28% (Q3'25).
content:
From Q4 2024 earnings release (marketscreener.com):
- Q4 2024 APAC reported revenue: $15,156M
- Q4 2024 APAC FX Effect: -$50M
- Q4 2024 APAC CC Revenue: $15,206M
- Q4 2024 APAC CC YoY growth: 9%
- Q4 2023 APAC reported: $13,979M
- FY 2024 APAC reported: $56,815M, CC: $58,184M, CC YoY growth: 13%

From question description:
- Q3 2025 APAC CC: $17,691M, up 19.28% YoY
- Q3 2024 APAC CC derived: ~$14,831M

Q1 2025 APAC CC YoY growth: ~15% (from ppc.land article)

Sequential Q3→Q4 2024 APAC CC: +2.5% ($14,831M → $15,206M)
